high_cpu.subject: [SOC ALERT] High CPU Usage on {hostname}
high_cpu.body:
SOC Platform Alert
==================

Severity: HIGH
Alert Type: High CPU Utilization
Host: {hostname}
Timestamp: {timestamp}

Details:
  Current CPU Usage: {cpu_percent}%
  Threshold: {threshold}%
  Duration: {duration_minutes} minutes

Recommended Actions:
  1. Check top/htop for resource-intensive processes
  2. Review application logs for errors
  3. Consider scaling resources if load is sustained

Dashboard: http://localhost:5601
Zabbix: http://localhost:8080

--
SOC Platform Phase 1 | Automated Alert

high_memory.subject: [SOC ALERT] High Memory Usage on {hostname}
high_memory.body:
SOC Platform Alert
==================

Severity: HIGH
Alert Type: High Memory Utilization
Host: {hostname}
Timestamp: {timestamp}

Details:
  Memory Used: {memory_used_gb}GB / {memory_total_gb}GB
  Usage Percent: {memory_percent}%
  Threshold: {threshold}%
  Available: {memory_available_gb}GB

Recommended Actions:
  1. Identify memory-intensive processes with 'ps aux --sort=-%mem'
  2. Check for memory leaks in applications
  3. Review swap usage

Dashboard: http://localhost:5601
Zabbix: http://localhost:8080

--
SOC Platform Phase 1 | Automated Alert

disk_critical.subject: [SOC ALERT] Critical Disk Space on {hostname}:{mount_point}
disk_critical.body:
SOC Platform Alert
==================

Severity: CRITICAL
Alert Type: Critical Disk Space
Host: {hostname}
Mount Point: {mount_point}
Timestamp: {timestamp}

Details:
  Used: {disk_used_gb}GB / {disk_total_gb}GB
  Usage Percent: {disk_percent}%
  Threshold: {threshold}%
  Available: {disk_available_gb}GB

Recommended Actions:
  1. Identify large files: find {mount_point} -size +100M -type f
  2. Clear old logs: journalctl --vacuum-size=500M
  3. Archive or delete unnecessary data immediately

Dashboard: http://localhost:5601
Zabbix: http://localhost:8080

--
SOC Platform Phase 1 | Automated Alert

host_down.subject: [SOC ALERT] Host Unreachable: {hostname}

failed_logins.subject: [SOC SECURITY ALERT] Brute-Force Detected from {source_ip}
failed_logins.body:
SOC Platform Security Alert
===========================

Severity: CRITICAL
Alert Type: SSH Brute-Force Attack Detected
Target Host: {hostname}
Source IP: {source_ip}
Timestamp: {timestamp}

Details:
  Failed Attempts: {attempt_count} in {timeframe} minutes
  Threshold: {threshold} attempts
  Targeted User: {targeted_user}
  Protocol: {protocol}

MITRE ATT&CK: T1110.001 (Brute Force: Password Guessing)

Recommended Actions:
  1. Block source IP immediately: iptables -A INPUT -s {source_ip} -j DROP
  2. Review /var/log/auth.log for additional details
  3. Verify no successful logins from this IP
  4. Consider adding to firewall blocklist
  5. Notify affected user to change credentials

Kibana Dashboard: http://localhost:5601
Wazuh Manager: http://localhost:55000

--
SOC Platform Phase 1 | Automated Security Alert

unauthorized_access.subject: [SOC SECURITY ALERT] Unauthorized Access Attempt on {hostname}

recovery.subject: [SOC RECOVERY] Alert Resolved: {alert_type} on {hostname}
